2605.00068.title: Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization for Fusion Energy and Scientific Applications
2605.00068.paper_summary: Inertial Confinement Fusion (ICF) holds transformative promise for sustainable, near-limitless clean energy, yet remains constrained by prohibitively high costs and limited experimental opportunities. This paper presents Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization (HL-MBO), a framework that integrates expert knowledge with few-shot, uncertainty-aware machine learning to accelerate discovery in data-scarce, high-stakes scientific domains. HL-MBO introduces a meta-learned surrogate model with an expert-informed acquisition function to recommend candidate experiments. To foster trust and enable informed decisions, HL-MBO also provides interpretable explanations of its suggestions. We show HL-MBO outperforms current BO methods on ICF energy yield optimization, as well as benchmarks in molecular optimization and critical temperature maximization for superconducting materials.
2605.00068.paper_summary_zh: 慣性約束融合（ICF）對於可持續、近乎無限的清潔能源具有變革性的潛力，但仍受到過高成本和有限實驗機會的限制。本文提出了一種人類參與的元貝葉斯優化（HL-MBO）框架，該框架將專家知識與少量樣本、考慮不確定性的機器學習相結合，以加速在數據稀缺、高風險的科學領域中的發現。HL-MBO 引入了一種元學習的替代模型，並使用專家知識驅動的獲取函數來推薦候選實驗。為了促進信任並使決策更具信息性，HL-MBO 還提供了其建議的可解釋性解釋。我們展示了 HL-MBO 在 ICF 能量產量優化方面優於當前的貝葉斯優化方法，以及在分子優化和超導材料的臨界溫度最大化基準測試中的表現。
2605.00068.author: Ricardo Luna Gutierrez et.al.
2605.00068.authors: Ricardo Luna Gutierrez, Sahand Ghorbanpour, Ejaz Rahman, Varchas Gopalaswamy, Riccardo Betti, Vineet Gundecha, Aarne Lees, Soumyendu Sarkar
